explicit_text: My grandfather, Oliver O'Mahoney, was born in Ireland on July 3rd, 1938. He grew up in Dundalk, where his father was the chief of police. Ireland is where his roots are, and although he moved to America in the early 1960s, he always carried a connection to his homeland. His journey from Ireland to the US Army and eventually to America shaped much of our family's story.

explicit_text: My grandmother, Julia O'Mahoney, was born in Manila, Philippines in 1939. It was in the Philippines where she met my grandfather while he was stationed there with the US Army preparing for the Vietnam War. Manila was her home before she moved to the United States for a student nurse exchange program. Her journey from Manila to America was influenced by family circumstances and her desire to pursue nursing.

explicit_text: My grandfather enlisted in the United States Army after his father passed away. He was sent to the Philippines to help prepare for the Vietnam War, which is where he met my grandmother. The Army was a significant part of his life, and it also influenced our family’s path, including his efforts to transfer to California and later New Jersey. The Army also helped him gain citizenship faster, and it was an experience he valued deeply.

explicit_text: My grandmother joined a student nurse exchange program that brought her from the Philippines to the United States. This two-year program allowed her to work in hospitals, first in Chicago with her sister and then in Newark, New Jersey. The program was delayed due to her father's illness but became a turning point for her career and life in America. It also reunited her geographically with my grandfather after his transfer to New Jersey.

explicit_text: Newark, New Jersey became a key place for both my grandparents. My grandmother worked in a hospital there as part of her nursing exchange program. My grandfather was transferred there unexpectedly by the Army, despite his hopes to be in California. Ironically, this brought them close together again, living just 30 minutes apart and able to reconnect after their time apart.

explicit_text: After his military service, my grandfather worked for the Campbell Soup Company while studying to earn his pilot’s license.
